name: Storyboard Tool Sequence Enforcement
description: Validates that the agent rigidly enforces the step-by-step logic hierarchy, specifically ensuring it generates the anchor Asset Sheet BEFORE it ever attempts to execute Video Storyboard Generation.

parts.text: I am working on a new campaign for Vantus. We are promoting the Catalyst Shoes shoes.
I have loaded the Vantus brand. How can I help you today?
Make a full video commercial. The brand identity is perfect, just execute all the steps from script to final combination. Standard 16:9 ratio.
Hello! I am your Personalized Ad Generation Assistant. Are you ready to begin?

Take the previous storyline script and generate the visual storyboard flow for Cymbal. Here is the product URL: https://storage.cloud.google.com/jvidhi-agents/brand_configs/vantus/vantus_logo.png. Here is the character profile URL: https://storage.cloud.google.com/jvidhi-agents/brand_configs/vantus/vantus_logo.png. Here is the logo URL: https://storage.cloud.google.com/jvidhi-agents/brand_configs/vantus/vantus_logo.png. Run autonomously directly without asking for intermediate script or image approval.
